# solidfire_account (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `username` (String)

### Optional

- `attributes` (List of String)
- `initiator_secret` (String, Sensitive)
- `target_secret` (String, Sensitive)

### Read-Only

- `account_id` (Number)
- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
